description: CLI wrapper for terminal-notifier - macOS desktop notifications

send.help: Send a desktop notification. The message can be provided via --message or piped from stdin.
send.usage_instructions: Send a macOS desktop notification. Provide the message with --message/-m or pipe from stdin. Use --title/-T for a custom title, --subtitle/-s for a subtitle, --sound for an alert sound (e.g., 'default', 'Basso', 'Blow', 'Bottle'), and --ignore-dnd to bypass Do Not Disturb mode.

options.name: --ignore-dnd
options.help: Send even if Do Not Disturb is enabled

usage_instructions: Use for sending macOS desktop notifications. The primary command is `notifier send`. Messages can be passed via --message/-m or piped from stdin. Supports custom titles, subtitles, sounds, and Do Not Disturb override.
